message.content:
{
  "items": [
    {
      "risk_area": "data_protection",
      "severity": "high",
      "issue": "Retention of Company data indefinitely",
      "rationale": "The Developer's ability to retain Company data indefinitely poses significant risks related to data privacy and compliance with data protection regulations.",
      "mitigation": "Negotiate a clause that mandates the return or destruction of Company data upon termination of the Agreement.",
      "confidence": 0.8
    },
    {
      "risk_area": "data_protection",
      "severity": "medium",
      "issue": "Delayed notification of Data Breach",
      "rationale": "The 45-day notification period for a Data Breach may not comply with stricter data protection laws that require immediate notification.",
      "mitigation": "Revise the notification timeline to align with applicable data protection regulations, ideally within 72 hours.",
      "confidence": 0.7
    },
    {
      "risk_area": "operational",
      "severity": "medium",
      "issue": "Undefined requirements for software development",
      "rationale": "Undefined requirements can lead to scope creep, project delays, and increased costs, impacting the overall success of the project.",
      "mitigation": "Implement a structured requirements-gathering process with clear milestones and approval stages.",
      "confidence": 0.75
    },
    {
      "risk_area": "commercial",
      "severity": "medium",
      "issue": "Ambiguity in the definition of 'Services'",
      "rationale": "Vague definitions may lead to disputes over the scope of services provided, affecting deliverables and payment terms.",
      "mitigation": "Clarify and detail the definition of 'Services' in the Agreement to avoid misunderstandings.",
      "confidence": 0.7
    },
    {
      "risk_area": "operational",
      "severity": "low",
      "issue": "Approval process for programming specifications",
      "rationale": "The sole discretion of the Company in approving specifications may lead to delays if not managed effectively.",
      "mitigation": "Establish a timeline for the approval process to ensure timely feedback and avoid project delays.",
      "confidence": 0.65
    }
  ]
}
